sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28529" key="drwma=|" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρωμᾷ·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρέχει,</foreign> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρωμίσσουσα·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρέχουσα,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
